action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score is 0.5768 (alpha=1.2, no stuck). Latest alpha=0.7+stuck scored 0.5605 - higher success rate but worse distance. Distance matters more in the score formula (300/d_i). Analysis: Lowering alpha when stuck increases distance, which hurts more than the success gain helps. Need strategies that reduce distance while maintaining or improving success rate. Key ideas: 1) Try higher alpha values (1.5, 1.8) to reduce distance, 2) Two-phase alpha (high early, lower later when frontiers are sparse), 3) Better stuck handling that doesn't lower alpha too much. Decision: Test multiple configurations on training maps to find the optimal approach.
